item.title: Why This Car Can’t Be Street Legal
item.description: Explore why this car fails to meet street-legal requirements. From safety to modifications, see the challenges that prevent it from hitting public roads.

media:content.media:title: Why This Car Can’t Be Street Legal
media:content.media:description: Explore why this car fails to meet street-legal requirements. From safety to modifications, see the challenges that prevent it from hitting public roads.

item.title: Charging $500 for a Lamborghini Oil Change
item.description: Learn how and why an oil change for a Lamborghini costs $500. Insights into luxury car maintenance, high-performance requirements, and expert service techniques.

media:content.media:title: Charging $500 for a Lamborghini Oil Change
media:content.media:description: Learn how and why an oil change for a Lamborghini costs $500. Insights into luxury car maintenance, high-performance requirements, and expert service techniques.

item.description: A customer faces unexpected and unwelcome news. Watch the situation unfold and see how challenges or issues are addressed with honesty and clarity.

item.title: 2003 Mustang Cobra Tune-Up
item.description: Watch an American muscle car, the 2003 Mustang Cobra, get a full tune-up. See the maintenance, adjustments, and performance checks that keep this classic running strong.

media:content.media:title: 2003 Mustang Cobra Tune-Up
media:content.media:description: Watch an American muscle car, the 2003 Mustang Cobra, get a full tune-up. See the maintenance, adjustments, and performance checks that keep this classic running strong.

item.title: Shop Update: Tackling Tough Jobs

item.title: Wrong Engine Cover Installed
item.description: Discover the issues that arise when the wrong engine cover is used. Watch the correction process and learn tips to avoid similar mistakes in vehicle maintenance.

item.title: What Happened to Planet X?
item.description: Explore the mystery of Planet X and the theories surrounding its existence. Discover scientific insights, historical sightings, and why it continues to capture curiosity.

item.title: $2,200 Just for That?

item.description: A classic Rolls-Royce needs extensive work to restore its performance and appearance. Watch the inspection, repairs, and restoration process in detail.

item.description: Watch as I reveal and explore a recent purchase. See the unboxing, first impressions, and potential uses of this new item.
